column2:
The graph illustrates
Untuk membuka deskripsi grafik secara formal — variasi yang lebih akademis dari "show".
The graph illustrates the population growth in three countries between 1990 and 2020.

The chart shows
Pembuka standar untuk bar/pie chart, aman dan jelas.
The chart shows the percentage of households using renewable energy from 2005 to 2015.

The table provides information about
Khusus untuk tabel data — lebih natural daripada "shows" untuk tabel.
The table provides information about average monthly expenditure of four families in 2018.

The diagram depicts
Untuk diagram proses atau siklus — "depicts" lebih akademis dari "shows".
The diagram depicts the process of paper recycling from collection to final product.

The map presents
Untuk soal peta perubahan lokasi (before/after).
The map presents the changes that took place in the town of Stokeford between 1930 and 2010.

A sharp rise
Kenaikan tajam dan cepat — gunakan untuk lonjakan besar dalam grafik.
There was a sharp rise in unemployment rates from 2008 to 2009.
The figure experienced a sharp rise of nearly 40%.

A gradual increase
Kenaikan perlahan dan stabil — cocok untuk garis yang naik landai.
The data shows a gradual increase in tourist numbers throughout the decade.

A steady growth
Pertumbuhan konsisten tanpa fluktuasi — sinonim elegan dari "stable rise".
The country witnessed a steady growth in GDP between 2000 and 2010.

Surge / soar / climb
Tiga verba untuk variasi: surge & soar = naik dramatis; climb = naik bertahap.
Oil prices surged in 2014.
Membership numbers soared to a record high.
Profits climbed steadily over five years.

A sharp fall
Penurunan tajam — pasangan dari "sharp rise".
There was a sharp fall in birth rates after 1980.

A gradual decline
Penurunan perlahan dan konsisten.
The graph shows a gradual decline in newspaper readership over the past two decades.

Plummet / plunge
Untuk penurunan sangat tajam — efek dramatis, gunakan hemat.
Stock prices plummeted by 30% in a single week.
Sales plunged after the policy change.

Drop / decrease
Verba netral untuk penurunan — aman digunakan berkali-kali jika divariasikan dengan kata lain.
The number of visitors dropped slightly in winter months.
Consumption decreased from 50 to 35 units.

Remain stable
Untuk garis datar — angka tidak berubah signifikan.
The unemployment rate remained stable at around 5% throughout the period.

Level off
Setelah naik/turun, garis menjadi datar — sering muncul di grafik IELTS.
After rising sharply in the first half, the figure levelled off at 80,000.

Plateau at
Mencapai titik datar (plateau) pada angka tertentu.
The percentage plateaued at approximately 60% from 2015 onwards.

Fluctuate considerably
Naik-turun secara signifikan — untuk garis zig-zag.
Rainfall levels fluctuated considerably throughout the year.

Vary
Bervariasi tapi tidak ekstrem — alternatif lebih halus dari "fluctuate".
Consumption patterns varied across the four regions surveyed.

In contrast
Untuk membandingkan dua tren yang berlawanan dalam grafik.
The number of cyclists rose steadily. In contrast, car usage fell by 20%.

Conversely
Sinonim formal dari "in contrast" — variasi untuk band 7+.
Urban populations grew rapidly; conversely, rural areas saw a steady decline.

While X, Y...
Pola kalimat efisien untuk membandingkan dua subjek dalam satu kalimat.
While men's participation increased by 15%, women's participation remained unchanged.

Approximately
Untuk angka yang dibulatkan — lebih akademis daripada "about".
Approximately 45% of respondents preferred online shopping.

Roughly
Sinonim "approximately" untuk variasi.
Roughly one-third of households owned two or more cars.

Just over / just under
Untuk angka yang sedikit di atas atau di bawah nilai tertentu.
Just over 60% of students chose science subjects, while just under 20% selected arts.

Overall, it is clear that...
Pembuka paragraf overview — wajib ada di Task 1 untuk band 6+.
Overall, it is clear that consumption of renewable energy rose significantly, while reliance on coal declined.

It is often argued that
Pembuka esai yang menyajikan klaim umum sebelum opini penulis.
It is often argued that technology has made people less sociable.

There is a growing debate over
Menunjukkan isu yang sedang ramai diperdebatkan — kuat untuk topik kontemporer.
There is a growing debate over whether university education should be free for all citizens.

In recent years
Frasa pembuka netral untuk topik tren modern.
In recent years, working from home has become increasingly common across many industries.

Whether... is a controversial issue
Membingkai topik sebagai isu kontroversial yang akan dibahas.
Whether governments should fund space exploration is a controversial issue in modern politics.

In my opinion
Cara paling aman dan jelas untuk menyatakan pendapat pribadi.
In my opinion, the benefits of remote learning outweigh its drawbacks.

I firmly believe that
Pendapat dengan keyakinan kuat — gunakan saat argumen Anda solid.
I firmly believe that stricter regulations on plastic packaging are essential.

From my perspective
Variasi formal dari "in my opinion".
From my perspective, public investment in renewable energy should be a top priority.

It is my conviction that
Sangat formal dan tegas — cocok untuk kalimat thesis di paragraf pembuka.
It is my conviction that early childhood education shapes long-term academic success.

On one hand
Pembuka untuk menyajikan satu sisi argumen.
On one hand, public transport reduces traffic congestion and pollution.

On the other hand
Pasangan wajib dari "on one hand".
On the other hand, private cars offer flexibility that buses and trains cannot match.

Some argue that... while others claim
Pola seimbang untuk menyajikan dua kelompok pendapat.
Some argue that homework reinforces learning, while others claim it causes unnecessary stress.

Furthermore
Untuk menambahkan poin pendukung yang lebih kuat.
Furthermore, regular exercise has been shown to improve mental health.

Moreover
Sinonim "furthermore" — gunakan bergantian untuk variasi.
Moreover, online courses provide access to education for students in remote areas.

In addition
Versi paling netral untuk menambah informasi.
In addition, smaller class sizes allow teachers to give individual attention to each student.

What is more
Frasa addition yang sedikit lebih casual tapi tetap akademis — variasi natural.
What is more, recycling creates new employment opportunities in green industries.

However
Penghubung kontras paling umum dan aman.
Many people enjoy fast food. However, it poses serious health risks if consumed regularly.

Nevertheless
Berarti "meskipun demikian" — kontras dengan nuansa konsesi.
The policy was unpopular. Nevertheless, it produced significant economic benefits.

On the contrary
Untuk menyangkal pernyataan sebelumnya — bukan sekadar kontras biasa.
Critics claim renewable energy is inefficient. On the contrary, recent data shows it now rivals fossil fuels.

Despite this
"Meskipun demikian" — mengakui poin sebelumnya tetapi tetap melanjutkan argumen.
The vaccine has minor side effects. Despite this, it remains the most effective public health tool available.

Because of
Diikuti noun phrase, bukan klausa — perhatikan struktur.
Because of rapid urbanisation, many farmlands have been converted into housing.

Due to
Sinonim "because of" — sama-sama diikuti noun phrase.
Due to rising sea levels, several coastal cities face the threat of flooding.

As a result of
Menekankan hubungan sebab-akibat secara eksplisit.
As a result of automation, certain manufacturing jobs have disappeared entirely.

Therefore
Penghubung akibat paling umum — selalu diikuti tanda baca yang tepat.
Smoking damages the lungs; therefore, governments impose heavy taxes on tobacco.

Consequently
Sinonim "therefore" yang lebih akademis.
Many young people prefer digital media. Consequently, traditional newspapers have lost readership.

This leads to
Untuk menjelaskan rantai akibat — diikuti noun phrase.
Excessive screen time disrupts sleep patterns. This leads to reduced productivity at work or school.

For instance
Pembuka contoh paling natural — sinonim "for example" untuk variasi.
Many countries have invested in green energy. For instance, Germany now produces over 40% of its electricity from renewables.

A case in point is
Cara elegan untuk memperkenalkan contoh konkret yang mendukung argumen.
Some cities have successfully reduced car traffic. A case in point is Amsterdam, where cycling infrastructure dominates urban planning.

In conclusion
Pembuka paragraf penutup paling aman dan jelas.
In conclusion, while social media offers many benefits, its negative effects on mental health cannot be ignored.

To sum up
Sinonim "in conclusion" — sedikit lebih ringkas.
To sum up, government investment in education yields long-term economic and social benefits.

In light of the above
Frasa penutup band 7+ — menunjukkan refleksi atas argumen sebelumnya.
In light of the above, it is reasonable to conclude that stricter environmental laws are necessary.

Taking everything into account
Penutup yang menyiratkan pertimbangan menyeluruh — kuat untuk band 7+.
Taking everything into account, the advantages of bilingual education clearly outweigh the challenges.

It can be argued that
Untuk menyatakan klaim tanpa terdengar terlalu absolut — penting untuk band 7+.
It can be argued that financial incentives are more effective than penalties in changing public behaviour.

It seems that
Hedging halus untuk klaim berdasarkan observasi, bukan fakta absolut.
It seems that younger generations are more environmentally conscious than their parents.

It is likely that
Untuk prediksi atau klaim probabilistik — hindari "definitely" yang terlalu kuat.
It is likely that artificial intelligence will reshape most industries within the next decade.

There is a tendency for
Untuk menggambarkan kecenderungan umum — diikuti noun + to-infinitive.
There is a tendency for urban residents to spend less time outdoors than rural populations.
